sample.rule: Only jobs with full descriptions and at least one extracted industry are analyzed.

methodology.ordering: Industries, roles, required skills, preferred skills, and regions are sorted by job_count descending.
methodology.counting: job_count is the number of unique job_id values containing the item.
methodology.role: Role is inferred from the job title using deterministic keyword rules; otherwise a cleaned title is used.
methodology.salary: min is the lowest disclosed lower bound, max is the highest disclosed upper bound, and median is the median of per-job salary-range midpoints. Negotiable salaries are not imputed.
methodology.work_nature: Employment type is unavailable in the source; experience_distribution is included without inferring employment type.
